changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Iran easing Hormuz restrictions per maritime data — countries cutting individual deals instead of joining US coalition. This is a partial de-escalation on the economic front, though military strikes continue. Europe refuses Hormuz naval deployment. Putin-Trump call today is the key diplomatic variable for Ukraine. Zero ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Iran 'revenge' cluster missile attack on Israel — 2 killed in Ramat Gan
latest_news.text: Iran fires cluster munitions at central Israel in revenge for Larijani/Soleimani assassinations. 2 killed (couple in 70s) in Ramat Gan. Multiple-warhead missiles evade defenses. Shrapnel hits Tel Aviv train station.

latest_news.headline: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz, data suggests
latest_news.text: Iran appears to be easing Strait of Hormuz restrictions. Data shows more commercial vessels passing through. Countries striking individual deals with Iran rather than joining US naval coalition.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine sends 201 military experts to counter Iranian drones in Gulf
latest_news.text: Zelenskyy announces Ukraine sending 201 military drone experts to Gulf states. Claims Iran drones contain Russian components. Calls Moscow and Tehran 'brothers in hatred.'

latest_news.headline: Putin holds Crimea meeting, Russia ready for Geneva negotiations
latest_news.text: Putin holds Crimea meeting on March 18. Stubb announces need for territorial concessions. Russia signals readiness for Geneva talks. Putin-Trump call scheduled today.

latest_news.headline: Europe rejects Trump's Hormuz warship demands
latest_news.text: Multiple European countries reject Trump's call to send warships to Hormuz. Some discuss alternative help but refuse direct naval deployment. NATO coalition efforts stalling.

latest_news.headline: Ali Larijani funeral in Tehran — Iran vows continued resistance
latest_news.text: Massive funeral procession in Tehran for Ali Larijani and Gholamreza Soleimani. Iran officials vow continued resistance. Death deepens leadership crisis.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 14:04 UTC) — War Day 24. MIXED SIGNALS: (1) Iran 'revenge' attack with cluster missiles on Israel — 2 killed in Ramat Gan; (2) Maritime data shows Hormuz easing — Iran allowing more ships, countries cutting individual deals bypassing US coalition; (3) Europe rejects Trump Hormuz warship demands; (4) Ukraine sends 201 drone experts to Gulf, Zelenskyy calls Tehran/Moscow 'brothers'; (5) Putin-Trump call TODAY — Russia ready for Geneva, but Lavrov pre-rejects concessions; (6) Larijani/Soleimani funeral — vows continued resistance; (7) Joe Kent resigns — highest-level departure over Iran war; (8) Pakistan-Afghanistan: no ceasefire, 400+ dead in Kabul hospital. Hormuz is the key variable — Iran shifting from total blockade to selective passage deals.
